query:
INSERT INTO communications (channel, direction, toAddress, subject, body, status, sentAt, createdAt, approvedAt, approvedBy) VALUES 
('email', 'outbound', 'tenant@example.com', 'Rent Payment Confirmation', 'Thank you for your rent payment of $1,500 received on February 1, 2026.', 'sent', '2026-02-01 10:30:00', '2026-02-01 09:00:00', '2026-02-01 09:15:00', 1),
('sms', 'outbound', '+64212345678', NULL, 'Your maintenance request has been completed. Please check and confirm.', 'sent', '2026-02-03 14:20:00', '2026-02-03 14:00:00', '2026-02-03 14:05:00', 1),
('email', 'outbound', 'contractor@example.com', 'Invoice Payment - Property Maintenance', 'Invoice #12345 for plumbing repair has been paid. Amount: $450. Thank you.', 'sent', '2026-02-05 16:45:00', '2026-02-05 16:00:00', '2026-02-05 16:30:00', 1);
